chapters.title: The Small Key
chapters.content: While moving into her new apartment, Clara found a small bronze key hidden behind an old kitchen drawer. Nobody knew what it opened.

chapters.title: The Locked Door
chapters.content: In the basement of the building, she discovered a small locked storage room. The old key fit perfectly.

chapters.title: A Box of Memories
chapters.content: Inside the room, there was a wooden box filled with letters, photographs, and forgotten memories from someone who once lived there.
